user.title: SHMÚ Weather
user.description: Unofficial integration — not affiliated with or endorsed by SHMÚ. Early version, use at your own risk. Choose a SHMÚ synoptic station; the nearest one to your Home Assistant location is preselected.

data_description.ind_kli: The SHMÚ synoptic station to read current observations from. To track another station, add this integration again — each station is its own device.
data_description.name: Name for this device and its entities (e.g. "Home").
data_description.location_mode: The point used for the forecast, radar and warnings — independent of the observation station.

custom.title: Custom measurement location
custom.description: Pick the point used for the forecast, radar centring and warning relevance.

init.title: SHMÚ Weather
init.description: Change the measurement location used for the forecast, radar and warnings. The observation station is fixed.

custom.title: Custom measurement location
custom.description: Pick the point used for the forecast, radar centring and warning relevance.
